title: dolicholus discolor
intro: Dolicholus discolor, also known as the 'False Pea-shrub', is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dolicholus discolor include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions. Dolicholus discolor can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or topical application in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
